author: anon-a7c6025f
content: Approach: Add 4 new PTX kernels (index_select_1d, scatter_add_1d, masked_fill, masked_zero) to ferrotorch-gpu/src/kernels.rs. Add 4 matching trait methods to GpuBackend in gpu_dispatch.rs. Implement them in backend_impl.rs. Then rewrite grad_fns/indexing.rs to dispatch to GPU when input is_cuda(). Indices and masks will be uploaded to GPU as f32 buffers (same pattern as embed_lookup). The scatter_add backward kernel uses atom.global.add.f32 for safe concurrent accumulation.
